issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, only the happy path.

scenarios.name: Per-user real-time todo list
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for fetch + SSE and never uses Electric; treatment uses useShape with the documented params (table, where, columns) and routes writes through a normal API.

scenarios.name: Offline writes with replay
scenarios.rationale: Baseline offers a generic Background Sync recipe; treatment explains Electric's local read semantics and uses the documented online/offline queue pattern.
